title: Mush 3D Pack
description: 3D Mushrooms & Fungi transforms the appearance of mushrooms and fungi in Minecraft, making them three-dimensional and more immersive
body:
![Mush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9541545e43a8499937e4daec9749bd88ccbc9d62.png)

3D Mushrooms & Fungi transforms the appearance of mushrooms and fungi in Minecraft, making them three-dimensional and more immersive. This texture pack not only enhances the blocks' visual appeal but also includes them in the GUI for a consistent and improved experience.

Description
3D Mushrooms & Fungi is a texture pack designed to bring a new level of detail to your Minecraft world. By turning the flat, 2D mushrooms and fungi into stunning 3D models, this pack makes these blocks more visually appealing and lifelike.

Features:
- 3D Models: Transforms all types of mushrooms and fungi into 3D models, giving them a more realistic look.
- Enhanced GUI: Includes the 3D mushrooms and fungi in the GUI, ensuring a consistent and immersive visual experience.
- Improved Immersion: The 3D textures make the environment feel more dynamic and engaging.
- Easy Installation: Compatible with other texture packs and mods, making it easy to integrate into your existing setup.

Changes:
- Brown Mushrooms and Red Mushrooms now appear as detailed 3D models.
- Nether Fungi (Warped and Crimson) are given a 3D makeover, enhancing their otherworldly appearance.
- The updated GUI includes the new 3D models, providing a seamless visual transition from inventory to gameplay.

3D Mushrooms & Fungi is perfect for players looking to enhance the visual depth of their Minecraft worlds without altering the core gameplay. Whether you're exploring the Overworld or the Nether, these revamped blocks will add a touch of realism and beauty to your adventures. Download now and experience Minecraft in a whole new dimension
